personas.name: Cost-Conscious Subscriber
personas.description: A user interested in meditation benefits but highly sensitive to subscription pricing and value for money.
goals: Access meditation content at a reasonable price
Get consistent value from a paid subscription
pain_points: App quality does not match the price
context: Evaluating whether to continue or cancel subscription
Comparing with free or cheaper alternatives
constraints: Needs clear value justification for payment

personas.name: Frustrated Performance User
personas.description: A regular user who values smooth app performance but is hindered by lag and sluggish UI.
goals: Use the app without delays or interruptions
Quickly access and play meditation sessions
context: Using the app during short breaks
Trying to relax or meditate quickly

personas.name: Privacy-Conscious User
personas.description: A user concerned about how their personal data is collected, stored, and used by the app.
goals: Use meditation features without compromising privacy
Understand how their personal data is handled
pain_points: Concerns about data collection and tracking
Discomfort with AI using personal data
Lack of transparency in privacy policies
context: Deciding whether to uninstall or continue using the app
constraints: Requires clear and transparent data practices
Avoids apps that misuse personal data

personas.name: Navigation-Struggling User
personas.description: A user who finds the app interface confusing and struggles to locate or organize desired content.
goals: Easily find and access meditation content
context: Using the app casually without deep exploration
constraints: Prefers minimal steps to access content

personas.name: Sleep-Focused User
personas.description: A user who primarily uses the app for sleep support and relies on uninterrupted playback of sleep content.
pain_points: Important sleep features locked behind paywalls
context: Using the app before or during sleep
Listening with screen off in bed
constraints: Cannot troubleshoot issues while trying to sleep
